release_summary: GONE badge threshold tightened from 0.7 to 0.5. Reserves GONE for stronger-signal cases (>50% gone risk = more likely gone than not). Avoids over-flagging the late-round candidate pool now that v2.3.4 uses next-turn horizon (where 7-12 pick waits dramatically compound hazard for past-ADP players). Available tier now 0.5+ (was 0.7+); contested 0.3-0.5 (was 0.3-0.7); unlikely 0.1-0.3 and likely_gone <0.1 unchanged.
